Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing on the Cross-Complaint.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Julia M. Wei, Esq. appeared with cross-complainants Lew Jenkins and Linda M. Jenkins, Trustees of the Jenkins Trust U/A/D 1/15/98, and Jack H. Freskos, Beneficiary of IRA 042640 at Westamerica Bank.
No appearance by defendant David Salma.
Default was entered against cross-defendant David Salma on October 22, 2008.
Roe defendants were dismissed on December 12, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Cross-complainants Lew Jenkins and Linda M. Jenkins, Trustees of the Jenkins Trust U/A/D 1/15/98, and Jack H. Freskos, Beneficiary of IRA 042640 at Westamerica Bank. and against cross-defendant David Salma as follows:

Damages/Principal - $2,148,392.47.
Attorney's Fees - $15,240.00.
Costs - Per Cost Memorandum.
Total - $2,163,632.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
